runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "go", "package_manager": "go mod", "build_commands": ["go mod tidy", "go build -o /usr/local/bin/zoraxy", "chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zoraxy", "apk add --update --no-cache curl make gcc g++ linux-headers openssl-dev nano", "curl -Lo ZeroTierOne.tar.gz https://codeload.github.com/zerotier/ZeroTierOne/tar.gz/refs/tags/1.10.6", "tar -xzvf ZeroTierOne.tar.gz", "cd ZeroTierOne-*/zeroidc", "cargo update -p getrandom", "cd ..", "make -f make-linux.mk", "mv ./zerotier-one /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one", "chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one"], "install_commands": ["apk add --update --no-cache curl make gcc g++ linux-headers openssl-dev nano", "apk add --update --no-cache tzdata python3 sudo netcat-openbsd libressl-dev openssh ca-certificates libc6-compat libstdc++"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.24.0", "system_packages": ["tzdata", "python3", "sudo", "netcat-openbsd", "libressl-dev", "openssh", "ca-certificates", "libc6-compat", "libstdc++"]}, "repo_type": "web_service", "base_image": "alpine:3.23", "base_image_rationale": "Alpine provides a lightweight runtime with sufficient support for Python, TLS, netcat, and other utilities used in the final stage.", "pitfalls": ["Go 1.24.0 requirement may clash with builder image's Go version if building outside CI; ensure the build image pins Go version.", "ZeroTier build relies on downloading from GitHub; network restrictions could block it.", "Mixing two languages (Go and Rust) in one image may cause larger image size; consider separate images or thinner final image.", "entrypoint.py path and Python environment must exist in final image; ensure entrypoint.py is present in context."], "notes": "This blueprint reflects the repository's multi-stage Dockerfile: a Go build for zoraxy, a Rust-based ZeroTier build, and a final Alpine-based runtime with Python entrypoint. The base image is chosen from official images and is augmented with the runtime dependencies observed in the final stage."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Build Zoraxy
FROM golang:1.24-alpine AS build-zoraxy

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zoraxy/source/ && mkdir -p /usr/local/bin/

# If you build it yourself, you will need to add the src directory into the docker directory.
COPY ./src/ /opt/zoraxy/source/

WORKDIR /opt/zoraxy/source/

RUN go mod tidy && \
    go build -o /usr/local/bin/zoraxy && \
    chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zoraxy


## Build ZeroTier
FROM rust:1.79-alpine AS build-zerotier

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zerotier/source/ && \
    mkdir -p /usr/local/bin/

WORKDIR /opt/zerotier/source/

RUN apk add --update --no-cache curl make gcc g++ linux-headers openssl-dev nano

RUN curl -Lo ZeroTierOne.tar.gz https://codeload.github.com/zerotier/ZeroTierOne/tar.gz/refs/tags/1.10.6 &&\
    tar -xzvf ZeroTierOne.tar.gz &&\
    cd ZeroTierOne-*/zeroidc &&\
    cargo update -p getrandom &&\
    cd .. &&\
    make -f make-linux.mk &&\
    mv ./zerotier-one /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one &&\
    chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one


## Final runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

RUN apk add --update --no-cache tzdata python3 sudo netcat-openbsd libressl-dev openssh ca-certificates libc6-compat libstdc++ && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/* /tmp/*

COPY --chmod=700 ./docker/entrypoint.py /opt/zoraxy/

COPY --from=build-zerotier /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one
COPY --from=build-zoraxy /usr/local/bin/zoraxy /usr/local/bin/zoraxy

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zoraxy/plugin/ && \
    echo "tun" | tee -a /etc/modules

WORKDIR /opt/zoraxy/config/

ENV TZ="Etc/UTC"
ENV ZEROTIER="false"

ENV AUTORENEW="86400"
ENV CFGUPGRADE="true"
ENV DB="auto"
ENV DOCKER="true"
ENV EARLYRENEW="30"
ENV ENABLELOG="true"
ENV FASTGEOIP="false"
ENV MDNS="true"
ENV MDNSNAME="''"
ENV NOAUTH="false"
ENV PLUGIN="/opt/zoraxy/plugin/"
ENV PORT="8000"
ENV SSHLB="false"
ENV UPDATE_GEOIP="false"
ENV VERSION="false"
ENV WEBROOT="./www"

VOLUME [ "/opt/zoraxy/config/" ]

LABEL com.imuslab.zoraxy.container-identifier="Zoraxy"

ENTRYPOINT [ "python3", "-u", "/opt/zoraxy/entrypoint.py" ]

HEALTHCHECK --interval=15s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 CMD nc -vz 127.0.0.1 $PORT || exit 1

{"path": "docker/.dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore Go build cache and vendor
/Go
*.exe
*.dll
*.so
*.dylib
/vendor
/bin
/tmp
.DS_Store
*.log
*.backup

# Ignore Go test binaries
**/testdata
**/*.test

# Ignore Node modules and Python caches
node_modules/
pcap/
__pycache__/
*.pyc

# Ignore IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/
"}

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zoraxy/source/ && mkdir -p /usr/local/bin/

RUN go mod tidy && \
    go build -o /usr/local/bin/zoraxy && \
    chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zoraxy


## Build ZeroTier
FROM rust:1.79-alpine AS build-zerotier

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zerotier/source/ && \
    mkdir -p /usr/local/bin/

WORKDIR /opt/zerotier/source/

RUN apk add --update --no-cache curl make gcc g++ linux-headers openssl-dev nano

RUN curl -Lo ZeroTierOne.tar.gz https://codeload.github.com/zerotier/ZeroTierOne/tar.gz/refs/tags/1.10.6 &&\
    tar -xzvf ZeroTierOne.tar.gz &&\

    mv ./zerotier-one /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one &&\
    chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one


## Final runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

RUN apk add --update --no-cache tzdata python3 sudo netcat-openbsd libressl-dev openssh ca-certificates libc6-compat libstdc++ && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/* /tmp/*

COPY --chmod=700 ./docker/entrypoint.py /opt/zoraxy/

COPY --from=build-zerotier /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one /usr/local/bin/zerotier-one
COPY --from=build-zoraxy /usr/local/bin/zoraxy /usr/local/bin/zoraxy

RUN mkdir -p /opt/zoraxy/plugin/ && \
    echo "tun" | tee -a /etc/modules

WORKDIR /opt/zoraxy/config/

ENV TZ="Etc/UTC"
ENV ZEROTIER="false"

ENV AUTORENEW="86400"
ENV CFGUPGRADE="true"
ENV DB="auto"
ENV DOCKER="true"
ENV EARLYRENEW="30"
ENV ENABLELOG="true"
ENV FASTGEOIP="false"
ENV MDNS="true"
ENV MDNSNAME="''"

ENV PLUGIN="/opt/zoraxy/plugin/"
ENV PORT="8000"
ENV SSHLB="false"
ENV UPDATE_GEOIP="false"
ENV VERSION="false"
ENV WEBROOT="./www"

VOLUME [ "/opt/zoraxy/config/" ]

LABEL com.imuslab.zoraxy.container-identifier="Zoraxy"

ENTRYPOINT [ "python3", "-u", "/opt/zoraxy/entrypoint.py" ]

HEALTHCHECK --interval=15s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 CMD nc -vz 127.0.0.1 $PORT || exit 1
